hooks.command:
# coderabbit:pre-commit-deliver
INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; test -f .nwave/des/deliver-session.json || exit 0; coderabbit review --plain --type uncommitted 2>&1 || true

# coderabbit:post-wave-agent
INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); name=str(d.get('subagent_type',''))+' '+str(d.get('agent_name','')); exit(0 if 'nw-' in name else 1)" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; coderabbit review --plain --type uncommitted 2>&1 || true
